loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing total current THD (I-THD) as proxy for harmonic distortion; per-order harmonics (H5/H7) and flicker/crest factor are not measured by this incomer meter.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing per-phase current and voltage THD trends — 5th/7th harmonics are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing Displacement PF and True PF — K-factor and Phase Angle are not measured by this asset; PF Gap is derived from Displacement PF.
